title: Le vicomte de Bragelonne, Tome I.
summaries: "Le vicomte de Bragelonne, Tome I." by Alexandre Dumas and Auguste Maquet is a novel published between 1847-1850. This final installment of the Three Musketeers trilogy follows the aging heroes during the reign of young Louis XIV. D'Artagnan and Athos separately work to restore Charles II to England's throne, while intrigues unfold at the French court. The story weaves political machinations, royal succession, and the famous mystery of the Man in the Iron Mask into an epic adventure of loyalty and ambition.
